title: Proposition A: the isotropic Gaussian-Hartree layer is the strict comparison infimum (T7, H-LAYER discharged)
statement: Proposition A holds as an UNCONDITIONAL theorem (H-LAYER discharged) within the declared lattice Reading-H domain: the isotropic Gaussian-Hartree dressing G_* is the strict comparison infimum over the physical competitor class. Proposition A holds as a conditional theorem within the hypothesis pair $\{\mathrm{H\text{-}LAYER},\,\mathrm{H\text{-}A0}\}$; certified for T6-conditional use on 2026-06-05 by dual independent audit plus operator sign-off.
scope: T7 DISCHARGED-THEOREM (operator-enacted 2026-06-10, sign-off APPROVED) within the DECLARED PHYSICAL DOMAIN: the Reading-H comparison over the physical competitor class C_phys (crystallographic momentum-shell / lattice, packing-bounded |Q|<=n_pack, coherence-resolved >=theta_min, real antipodal) at the operating endpoint I=2e-3, ROBUSTNESS-MU2 band [x0.5,x2]. H-LAYER is DISCHARGED as a hypothesis by the T7 proposition (t7-proposition-assembly v1.1): F[Q]-F[G_*]>0 for all Q in C_phys, i.e. the isotropic Gaussian-Hartree layer G_* is the strict comparison infimum. Assembled from three theorem-grade blockers: A off-shell domination NON-CIRCULAR (rho_off^ext<=R_lead(20)*r_R/(r_R+c*delta^2)=0.572<1 before the registered-class reduction), C on-shell reduction (survivors T'<=13), B certified thresholds (R_lead(13)=0.650<1 off-diagonal stability, joint(13)=1.097>1 SC-SCOPE endpoint with R_max interval-enclosed<=0.391<0.634 and the Ghat4 convention DERIVED from the (2pi)^3 measure, sunset S=1.13 rigorous, anchoring u_eff>0 monotonicity-certified). NOT unconditional TECT/TOE; NOT arbitrary-Q (non-lattice DR-2 = legacy fallback). Audit basis: internal 5-axis route audit T-029 (61/61 chain asserts, 17/17 load-bearing constants re-derived from Math424) + the operator adversarial-review chain (which caught and forced correction of the factor-2 convention, the off-shell escape, and the circularity); a fully-EXTERNAL third-party referee pass remains the standing publication-grade item (recorded, not a blocker for the operator-enacted tier). === prior (pre-T7) scope retained below === Theorem-grade only within the named hypothesis pair. Not a whole-Reading-H statement: the full selection claim stays at T5 pending STEP-5B.
falsifier: A counterexample within the H-layer class violating Proposition A, or failure of the transcribed H-A0 statement to support the proof steps on migration.
no_overclaim: T7 is SCOPE-QUALIFIED: DISCHARGED-THEOREM within the Reading-H / H-LAYER comparison domain ONLY (lattice class, operating endpoint, [x0.5,x2]), NOT unconditional TECT and NOT the TOE. The selection SIGN is the theorem; the SC-SCOPE third-cumulant endpoint is now theorem-grade (R_max interval-enclosed, convention derived) -- the earlier THIN-CERTIFIED/estimate wording is superseded for the endpoint. HONEST AUDIT CAVEAT: governance T7 asks for dual independent audit; this is met by the internal T-029 audit + the operator adversarial-review chain, with a fully-external referee pass as the standing publication item. Sectors C-F and the full TOE are NOT closed by this enactment (they were tier-capped while GAP-1 was open; the cap lifts but each still needs its own package). === prior no_overclaim retained below === Prop-A certification does NOT promote the full Reading-H selection. 'Reading-H is T6' is forbidden while STEP-5B is open.
